stories.title: Grades and takeaways from Hurricanes' series-clinc...
stories.summary: Carolina dominated again in Game 5 to eliminate Montreal. Here's what it all means, with a look ahead.

stories.title: Canes barrel into Cup Final with Game 5 blowout
stories.summary: Losers of three conference finals since 2019, the Hurricanes celebrated their first Stanley Cup Final berth in two decades after eliminating the Canadiens 6-1 in Game 5 on Friday night.

stories.title: Grieving Andersen steps up in goal for Hurricanes
stories.summary: Hurricanes goaltender Frederik Andersen played with a heavy heart in Friday's Game 5 victory over the Canadiens after his agent, Claude Lemieux, died by suicide Thursday.

stories.title: Grant makes homer history in UCLA's WCWS rout
stories.summary: Megan Grant broke the UCLA career homer record, and all nine Bruins in the lineup scored in the second inning of an 11-0 run-rule win over Arkansas at the Women's College World Series on Friday.

stories.title: Sorsby bet on IU at least 40 times as Hoosiers QB
stories.summary: Brendan Sorsby placed at least 40 bets involving Indiana football as a QB for the Hoosiers and used sportsbook accounts registered to a family member and friends to wager approximately $90,000 over four years, according to court documents filed Friday.
